title: Farewell To The Last journey
description: You know the anime “Seeing off Friren on her last journey.” OUR MOD WILL ADD (almost) EVERYTHING TO MINECRAFT FROM THE ANIME "Seeing off Friren on her last journey"
body:
# THE MOD WILL BE IMPROVED WITH MORE INFORMATION FROM THE ANIME "Seeing Off the Friren on His Last Journey"
## our mod adds (**almost**) EVERYTHING from the mod Freeren’s Last Journey, for those who don’t know what the anime Freen’s Last Journey is, then I’m ready to explain what our mod adds from there.

1. **WEAPONS**.
> - Sikira of the Dwarf Hero's Apprentice **STARK**
> - Hero's Apprentice Staff Freeren **FERN**
> - Candlelight painting of a **GODDESS** FROM THE CHURCH
2. **biome**.
> - winter desert
3. **spell**
> - barrier scroll (2 pieces, there is a division into classes)
> - Scroll of _Zeltrak_ (a spell that can destroy anything and everything)
> - scroll of flight
> - scroll of _threads_(you can capture anyone except the player)
4. **Dungeons**. (who knows, maybe it won’t spawn or it might spawn, it’s in development)
> - **dark** altar (you can find a barrier scroll)
> - **hand** of truth (you can find a scroll of flight)
> - **dungeon** of hell (you can find a scroll of zeltrac)

### The mod supports English and Russian languages, but in beta the translation will be in English, The author is Russian, so the questions are in Russian please
